query:
SELECT o.name, o.slug, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments ifa WHERE ifa.organizationId = o.id) as intakeFiles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments fa WHERE fa.organizationId = o.id) as taskFiles
FROM organizations o 
ORDER BY o.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT o.name, o.slug, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM intakeFileAttachments ifa WHERE ifa.organizationId = o.id) as intakeFiles,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fileAttachments fa WHERE fa.organizationId = o.id) as taskFiles
FROM organizations o 
ORDER BY o.name;
